About Coach CJ

BUILT IN
THE RING.

I'm a qualified England Boxing coach and Level 3 Personal Trainer with a background built on discipline, hard work and showing up when it counts. My coaching philosophy comes straight from boxing — the sport that demands your mind, body, and commitment all at once.

Away from coaching I work as a full-time firefighter and come from a military background — two environments that have taught me more about mental toughness, performing under pressure and never cutting corners than anything else. That same mindset goes into every programme I build and every client I coach.

Whether you're chasing fat loss, building strength, or levelling up your fitness — we'll build a plan that fits your life and pushes you past what you thought was possible.

England Boxing Qualified Level 3 PT Strength & Conditioning Nutrition Coaching Ex-Military Firefighter 15+ Years Gym Experience

The Process

HOW WE
DO IT.

01
Initial Consultation

We talk goals, lifestyle, training history, and what success looks like for you.

🗺️ Client Journey Flowchart View → 📋 Consultation Detail View →
02
Custom Plan Built

I create your tailored training and nutrition plan — designed around you, not a template.

03
You Get to Work

Follow your plan with full support, guidance, and coaching available throughout the week.

04
Review & Progress

Regular check-ins ensure your plan keeps evolving as you do. No plateau, just progress.

Strength Reboot — 4 Week

4 days/week. Upper/lower split. Sharp focused block to reignite your training with progressive overload throughout.

Intermediate
📄

4 days/week. Two phases — accumulation then intensification. Serious strength and muscle gains across 8 weeks.

Got Questions?

FREQUENTLY
ASKED.

Not at all. Every programme is built around the equipment you actually have — whether that's a fully equipped gym, a set of dumbbells at home, or just your bodyweight. Before we start I'll find out exactly what you're working with and design everything around it. No excuses, no barriers.

Starter gives you access to all online training guides and videos — perfect if you're self-motivated and just need the right content to follow. Elite is the full coaching experience — I'm actively in your corner every week. You get personalised workout and diet plans, weekly check-ins where I review your progress and adjust your programme, and a monthly call so we can talk through everything properly. If you're serious about results, Elite is the one.

Every week you log into the client area on this site and fill in a quick check-in form — how training went, your nutrition, energy levels, sleep, and any issues. I review every single one and use that information to adjust your programme for the following week. It keeps you accountable and means your plan is always evolving with you, not against you.

Absolutely. Whether you're a complete beginner or coming back after a long break, everything is built around your current level and progressed at a pace that works for you. There's no judgement here — just a structured plan and a coach who genuinely wants to see you succeed. The hardest part is starting. Once you do, we handle the rest.

Results depend on your goals, consistency and starting point — but most clients notice real improvements in strength, energy and body composition within the first 4-6 weeks. The key is showing up consistently and being honest in your check-ins. I'll handle the programming and adjustments — you just need to put in the work.

Yes — no contracts, no awkward conversations. You can cancel or upgrade your subscription at any time directly through Stripe. If you cancel, you keep access until the end of the billing period. If you want to upgrade from Starter to Elite, just get in touch and I'll sort it straight away.

Not at all — you never need to throw a punch. My boxing background shapes the way I coach: discipline, focus, structured progression and training with real purpose. Those principles translate directly into getting the best out of any fitness goal, whether you want to lose weight, build muscle, improve fitness or just feel better. The mentality is what matters.

The fire service teaches you things no gym ever could — how to perform under real pressure, how to stay focused when everything is against you, and how to show up every single day regardless of how you feel. Those aren't just qualities that make a good firefighter, they're exactly what builds a great athlete. I bring that same standard to my coaching. I don't cut corners, I don't accept excuses, and I genuinely care about the people I work with. When you train with me, you're not just getting a programme — you're getting a coach who knows what it means to commit.

Still got a question? I'm happy to help.

Get In Touch →
© 2026 Coach CJ. All rights reserved.  ·  Privacy Policy  ·  Terms & Conditions

This site uses cookies to improve your experience and analyse traffic. By continuing to use this site you accept our Privacy Policy.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Coach CJ ("we", "us", "our") operates the website coachcj.co.uk. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data.

What data we collect
We may collect your name, email address, and any information you submit through our contact or weekly check-in forms. We also collect anonymous usage data via third-party tools such as Elfsight.

How we use your data
Your data is used solely to provide and improve our coaching services, respond to enquiries, and track client progress. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Payments
All payments are processed securely by Stripe. We do not store your card details. Please refer to Stripe's privacy policy for details on how payment data is handled.

Cookies
This site uses cookies to improve functionality and analyse traffic. You may decline cookies, though this may affect some features of the site.

Your rights
You have the right to access, correct or delete any personal data we hold about you. To make a request, contact us at [email protected].

Contact
For any privacy-related questions, please contact us via the contact form on this website.

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: March 2026

By purchasing a coaching package or using this website, you agree to the following terms.

Services
Coach CJ provides online personal training services including workout programmes, nutrition guidance, and 1-on-1 coaching. Services vary by package as described on this website.

Payments & Subscriptions
All packages are billed monthly on a recurring basis via Stripe. By subscribing you authorise recurring charges until you cancel. Prices are listed in GBP and include VAT where applicable.

Cancellation
You may cancel your subscription at any time via Stripe or by contacting us. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds are issued for partial months.

Health & Safety
By purchasing a coaching package you confirm that you are in good health and have consulted a medical professional if necessary before beginning an exercise programme. Coach CJ accepts no liability for injury resulting from failure to follow programme instructions or disclose pre-existing conditions.

Intellectual Property
All training programmes, nutritional guidance, and content provided by Coach CJ remain the intellectual property of Coach CJ and may not be shared, resold or reproduced without written consent.

Contact
For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us via the contact form on this website.
